overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a robed character walking through a fantasy medieval city with stone architecture and red autumn foliage. The character approaches a large circular citadel and follows a cobblestone path along its side toward a bannered entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone approach to circular citadel with flanking monuments

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the cobblestone path toward the large circular citadel

entered.detail: massive circular stone building with wooden upper walls and arched base
tall pointed stone monuments lining the left side of the path
row of stone columns with arches on the right side
vibrant red-leaved trees visible behind the obelisks

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a wide cobblestone path toward a massive circular citadel. Stone obelisks line the left side while a classical colonnade stands on the right, with vibrant red autumn trees visible in the background under an overcast dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between circular citadel and tall stone arcade

events.description: character turns left to follow the path alongside the citadel wall

agents.ego_description: turns left and continues walking along the narrow cobblestone path beside the citadel wall toward the entrance

entered.detail: tall stone wall with vertical arches and columns on the left side
vertical red banners hanging beside the entrance door
large arched doorway with steps leading into the citadel

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a narrower passage running alongside the citadel wall. The path leads toward a large arched entrance adorned with red banners, with a tall stone facade visible on the left and the curved stone wall of the citadel dominating the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, open plaza toward a narrow, fortified entrance of a massive citadel. It begins with the character walking down a broad cobblestone path flanked by stone obelisks and a classical colonnade, with vibrant red autumn trees set against an overcast dusk sky. As the character progresses, the perspective shifts as they turn left, leaving the open plaza behind to enter a tighter passage. The scene then narrows, with a tall stone facade on the left and the imposing curved wall of the citadel dominating the right. Finally, the path leads directly toward a large arched entrance adorned with red banners.
